title: Project scaffold — directory structure, stub files, and xcodegen verification
description: Create the full directory tree and minimal compilable stub Swift files for every source path listed in the spec. Create Assets.xcassets with a placeholder AppIcon. Run xcodegen generate and confirm the project builds without missing-source warnings. This bead establishes the baseline all subsequent beads build upon.
acceptance_criteria: All directories under AggregatorApp/ (Common/, Models/, Threads/, Sources/, Today/, Settings/) and AggregatorAppTests/ exist
Every Swift file listed in the spec exists as a minimal compilable stub (empty struct or View body)
xcodegen generate exits 0 with no warnings about missing source paths
xcodebuild build (not test) exits 0 against the generated project
block_reason:
